title: elymus caninus
intro: Elymus caninus, also known as canine wheatgrass or wood barley, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Elymus caninus include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Elymus caninus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to support overall health and well-being.
